properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He's more than a story More than a song His love is gentle Yet it's so strong His grace is everlasting Just won't let you go His unending mercy A fountain of hope

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Do you know the Saviour That we introduce you Both now and forever He's faithful and true His name is Jesus He died to give you life a new Do you know the Saviour Oh, how He loves you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He pardons the debtor With Nothing to pay He offers forgiveness To those who gone astray He stands there waiting Ah the door of your heart And the moment you open His peace He'll impart

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: His name is Jesus He died to give you life a new Do you know the Saviour Oh, how He loves you He loves you, He loves you Oh, how He loves you
